title: Nuna-Edu-Toolkit: A Self-Hostable Platform for Collecting and Annotating First-Person Audio Datasets
description: A self-hostable, source-available platform for collecting and annotating first-person ambient audio captured by the Nuna wearable, and turning it into research datasets. From the AIoT Lab, The Chinese University of Hong Kong. Source-available under the PolyForm Noncommercial 1.0.0 license (non-commercial and research use only; commercial use requires a separate license).
